title: avena alpina subsp. ausserdorferi
intro: Avena alpina subsp. ausserdorferi, also known as the alpine oat, is a subspecies of the oat plant native to the European Alps. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Avena alpina subsp. ausserdorferi include soothing digestive issues, relieving menstrual cramps, and reducing stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
